title: Easy Exchange（简易替换）
description: Automatically replace broken blocks with offhand blocks. Toggle with R key, auto-refill from inventory. Perfect for building and terraforming.
body:
Easy Exchange（简易替换）

用自动方块替换功能简化你的建筑和地形改造工作流程。

   这个模组做什么？

Easy Exchange 是一个轻量级实用工具模组，可以自动用副手方块替换被破坏的方块。非常适合大型建筑项目、地形改造，以及任何需要快速交换方块的场景。

   使用方法

1. 主手持有挖掘工具
2. 副手持有替换方块
3. 按 R 键开启自动替换
4. 挖掘方块 - 它们会自动被替换
5. 副手用完时自动从背包补充
6. 再次按 R 键关闭功能

   必需依赖

- Architectury API (9.2.14+)
- FTB Ultimine (2001.1.0+) - 用于批量挖掘
- Fabric API（Fabric 版）或 Forge

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Easy Exchange

Simplify your building and terrain modification workflow with automatic block replacement.

What does this mod do?

Easy Exchange is a lightweight utility mod that automatically replaces broken blocks with blocks from your off-hand. It is ideal for large-scale building projects, terrain modification, and any scenario requiring fast block swapping.

How to Use

Hold a mining tool in your main hand.
Hold the replacement block in your off-hand.
Press the R key to enable automatic replacement.
Mine blocks — they will be replaced automatically.
Automatically refills from your inventory when the off-hand runs out.
Press the R key again to disable the function.

Required Dependencies

Architectury API (9.2.14+)
FTB Ultimine (2001.1.0+) — for mass mining
Fabric API (for Fabric version) or Forge
